tip_channel_limit: Mini program cards can only be sent via Official Account, WeChat Customer Service, and WeChat Mini Program channels. Other channels will fail to send. Replies within the Official Account must be associated with the Mini Program, and replies within the WeChat Mini Program must be the current Mini Program.
ph_title: Please enter the mini program card title
ph_appid: Please enter the mini program AppID
ph_path: Please enter the mini program path
tip_path: Please contact the mini program developer to get the path, e.g. /pages/index/index. Note: the path should start with /
msg_input_title: Please enter the mini program title
msg_input_appid: Please enter the mini program AppID
msg_input_path: Please enter the mini program path
msg_upload_cover: Please upload the mini program cover
msg_image_format: Only JPG and PNG formats are supported
